description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in formal 19th-century attire, including a long overcoat, waistcoat, and trousers. The figure holds a rolled document in his right hand and drapes his left arm over his coat, which is slung over his left forearm. The facial features are detailed, with a full beard and mustache, and the posture suggests a sense of movement or purpose. The sculpture stands on a rectangular plinth, providing stability and elevating the figure. The surface is dark and appears to be cast in bronze, with a slightly textured finish that highlights the folds of the clothing and the contours of the face. The overall impression is one of dignity and historical significance.
description: A dark bronze sculpture of a bearded man in formal 19th-century attire, holding a rolled document and coat, standing on a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's detailed facial features, rolled document in his right hand, and coat draped over his left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped coat, and the forward stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the overcoat, the figure's stance, and the rectangular plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rolled document in the right hand and the figure's posture from the opposite profile.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
